children.text: taxable income (determined without regard to this chapter and section 7518 of such Code ()) for the taxable year shall be reduced by the amount deposited for the taxable year out of amounts referred to in ;26 U.S.C. 7518section 53505(a)(1) of this title

a gain from a transaction referred to in shall not be taken into account if an amount equal to the net proceeds (as defined in joint regulations) from the transaction is deposited in the fund;section 53505(a)(3) of this title
the earnings (including gains and losses) from the investment and reinvestment of amounts held in the fund shall not be taken into account;

the earnings and profits of a corporation (within the meaning of section 316 of such Code ()) shall be determined without regard to this chapter and section 7518 of such Code (); and26 U.S.C. 31626 U.S.C. 7518
in applying the tax imposed by section 531 of such Code (), amounts held in the fund shall not be taken into account.26 U.S.C. 531

children.heading: .—Condition
children.label: b .—Condition
children.text: This section applies to an amount only if the amount is deposited in the fund under the agreement within the time provided in joint regulations.
